Market note: The strict 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-07 window was quiet. I found one official top-10 product enhancement, Chubb MyLegacy V on 2026-06-01, and no official top-10 launch in the past 48 hours. Older/current 2026 products and offers are included only as pricing-watch context.

HIGHLIGHTS - NEW LAUNCHES

Chubb Life Insurance Hong Kong Limited - Chubb MyLegacy Insurance Plan V - Harvest (安達傳承守創儲蓄保險計劃V - Harvest) (Savings)
Key features:

  • Chubb enhanced MyLegacy V with a new 3-year premium payment option under Harvest. The release positions the plan as a whole-life savings and legacy product with guaranteed cash value, non-guaranteed reversionary and terminal bonuses, and a 6-year guaranteed breakeven for the new 3-pay option.
  • Guaranteed cash value disclosed; new 3-pay Harvest option aims for full guaranteed breakeven by the 6th policy anniversary.

Source: https://chubb.mediaroom.com/news-releases?item=126560
